recommendations: High anomaly collapse rate (30.5%). Consider: 1) Increasing student capacity, 2) Adjusting distillation alpha to emphasize anomaly scores, 3) Using harder mining for anomaly samples.

hallucinated_anomalies.description: Normal samples incorrectly flagged as anomalies by student

recommendations: High anomaly collapse rate (29.7%). Consider: 1) Increasing student capacity, 2) Adjusting distillation alpha to emphasize anomaly scores, 3) Using harder mining for anomaly samples.
High boundary confusion (15.2%). Consider: 1) Boundary-aware loss weighting, 2) Calibration fine-tuning, 3) Ensemble smoothing.

key_findings: Anomaly types that transfer poorly: local_outlier, cluster_boundary. These may require specialized handling during distillation.
Best transferring knowledge: density (83.6% retention). Worst: local_structure (69.2% retention).
High anomaly collapse rate (29.8%). Student frequently misses anomalies the teacher detected.
